description: A profile portrait of a man shown from the left side against a gold background. He wears a large black flat hat and a dark brown robe with a heavy ornamental chain of office bearing medallions across his chest, ending in what appears to be a pendant of the Order of the Golden Fleece. He has blonde shoulder-length hair and a prominent nose and chin. The gold background and formal composition suggest a royal or imperial portrait. The style is characteristic of late 15th or early 16th century Northern European portraiture.

_meta.title: Portrait of the Emperor Maximilian I
